examples: The hot sun enables the grapes to reach optimum ripeness.
The optimum moment has been whittled down to 7:22 a.m.
The department of Environmental Conservation estimates the optimum population at 60.
Neoclassical economic theory says that optimum results are achieved when the relation is close.
The optimum amount of exercise for reducing risk was between nine and 14.9 met-hours per week.
